config.script:
#include "50203"
#define TYPEID_SPECIAL_COMMAND 1 #define ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED -1 #define ERR_IMPORTER_BROKE -2 #define DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE 3
class CNXDExportHandler private m_pExportPackage private m_pExportMsg private m_pObjectFilter private m_fpAfterExport private m_pFieldTranslator private m_pPerforming private m_nObjectCounter private m_pImporter private m_nLevel private m_pTypeExportInfoDict private m_oAlreadyExportedVRS private m_pExportObjectTranslator
private sub class_initialize() set m_pExportPackage = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.exportpackage") set m_pTypeExportInfoDict = doc_.system.activex("scripting.dictionary")
set m_pExportMsg = nothing set m_pObjectFilter = nothing set m_fpAfterExport = nothing set m_pFieldTranslator = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing m_nObjectCounter = 0 set m_pImporter = nothing set m_oAlreadyExportedVRS = nothing set m_pExportObjectTranslator = nothing m_nLevel = 0 end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pExportPackage = nothing set m_pExportMsg = nothing set m_pObjectFilter = nothing set m_fpAfterExport = nothing set m_pFieldTranslator = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing set m_pImporter = nothing set m_pTypeExportInfoDict = nothing set m_oAlreadyExportedVRS = nothing set m_pExportObjectTranslator = nothing end sub
public sub start_export(byref pOutputStream,byval nMsgType,byval strInfo) 'inicjuj strumień pOutputStream.write "<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""windows-1250""?>" + vbCrLf 'podłącz m_pExportPackage.ostream pOutputStream set m_pExportMsg = m_pExportPackage.newmsg()
'wypełnij i zapisz header with m_pExportMsg .header("msgtype") = clng(nMsgType) .header("format") = clng(NXD_MESSAGE_FORMAT) .header("application_name") = trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) #ifndef APPCONFIG_DEKLARACJE if not getCurrentUser() is nothing then .header("user") = getCurrentUser().strNazwa end if #endif .header("client_machine") = trans_.var(GVAR_MACHINE) .header("server_machine") = trans_.var(GVAR_DBSERVER) .header("server_guid") = trans_.getserverproperty(5) .header("creation_date") = trans_.var(GVAR_SYSDATE) .header("creation_time") = trans_.var(GVAR_SYSTIME) .header("engine_version") = trans_.var(GVAR_NAVO2001VERSION) .header("database_name") = trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME) #ifndef APPCONFIG_DEKLARACJE .header("database_app_version") = getglobprofileLong(GLOBPROF_DBVERSION) #endif .header("description") = strInfo end with if m_pImporter is nothing then m_pExportMsg.header.save else dim bBreak m_pImporter.OnMessageBegin m_pExportMsg.importmessage(),bBreak end if end sub public sub stop_export() if m_pImporter is nothing then m_pExportMsg.Save m_pExportPackage.Save else dim bBreak m_pImporter.OnMessageEnd m_pExportMsg,bBreak end if end sub
public sub set_importer(byref pImporter) set m_pImporter = pImporter end sub
public sub set_object_filter(byref pObjectFilter) set m_pObjectFilter = pObjectFilter end sub
public sub set_after_export_handler(byref fpAfterExport) set m_fpAfterExport = fpAfterExport end sub
public sub set_field_translator(byref pFieldTranslator) set m_pFieldTranslator = pFieldTranslator end sub
public sub set_export_object_translator(byref pExportObjectTranslator) set m_pExportObjectTranslator = pExportObjectTranslator end sub
'decyduje czy nalezy eksportować obiekt public function should_export(byval nType,byval IdObj,byval nVersion) should_export = not m_pExportMsg.wasobj(nType,IdObj) if should_export then if not m_oAlreadyExportedVRS is nothing then should_export = (m_oAlreadyExportedVRS.get_item_version(nType,IdObj) < nVersion) end if end if end function
public function new_object(byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval nVersion) set new_object = m_pExportMsg.newobj(nTypeId,nIdObj) if not m_oAlreadyExportedVRS is nothing then m_oAlreadyExportedVRS.refresh_item nTypeId,nIdObj,nVersion end if end function
public function new_special_object() set new_special_object = m_pExportMsg.newobj(TYPEID_SPECIAL_COMMAND,m_nObjectCounter+1) end function
public function export_object(byref pExportObject) if m_pImporter is nothing then pExportObject.save export_object = true else dim bBreak : bBreak = false m_pImporter.OnObject pExportObject,bBreak export_object = not bBreak end if end function
'decyduje czy wolno exportować obiekt public function can_export(byval nType,byval IdObj) if m_pObjectFilter is nothing then can_export = true else can_export = m_pObjectFilter(nType,IdObj) end if end function 'robi translację pola public function translate(byref pSrcObj,byref pFieldDef,byref varValue) if m_pFieldTranslator is nothing then translate = true else translate = m_pFieldTranslator(pSrcObj,pFieldDef,varValue) end if end function
public sub hide_progress() set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub show_progress(strText) if m_pPerforming is nothing then set m_pPerforming = doc_.performing(strText) else m_pPerforming.text = strText end if end sub
public sub on_object_exported(byref pObject,byref pExportObject) m_nObjectCounter = m_nObjectCounter + 1 if m_nObjectCounter mod 20 = 0 then show_progress "Wykesportowano: " + pObject.getobjdef.humanname + " (" + pObject.text + ")" end if if not m_fpAfterExport is nothing then m_fpAfterExport me, pObject,pExportObject end if end sub
public sub enter_level() m_nLevel = m_nLevel + 1 end sub public sub leave_level() m_nLevel = m_nLevel - 1 end sub public function get_level() get_level = m_nLevel end function
'exports any object (smart high level function) public function std_export_any_object(byval idType,byref pSrcObj) if not m_pExportObjectTranslator is nothing then 'overrides if m_pExportObjectTranslator(me,idType,pSrcObj) then exit function end if end if 'stock implemenation enter_level '---- latka na zamienniki ---- ---- ---- if idType = TYPEID_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU then '-- force export parent dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors( _ "select p_idobj from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania where c_idobj=" + cstr(pSrcObj.idobj)) dim idProdZam : idProdZam = clng(oRS.fields(0).value) dim oProd : set oProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idProdZam) std_export_any_object = std_export_top_object(me,oProd) 'trans_.message 0,0,"fex=" + oProd.text + "/" + cstr(oProd.idobj) '-- end force export parent else if pSrcObj.parent is nothing then std_export_any_object = std_export_top_object(me,pSrcObj) else std_export_any_object = std_export_top_object(me,pSrcObj.parent) end if end if leave_level end function
public property let importmode(byval nTypeId,byval nValue) m_pTypeExportInfoDict.item(nTypeId) = clng(nValue) end property
public property get importmode(byval nTypeId) if m_pTypeExportInfoDict.exists(nTypeId) then importmode = clng(m_pTypeExportInfoDict.item(nTypeId)) else importmode = clng(DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE) end if end property end class
function std_export_object_fields(byref pHandler,byref pExportObj,byref pSrcObj,byref bAnyList) std_export_object_fields = 0 bAnyList = false
pExportObj("_versionid") = clng(pSrcObj.versionid)
dim pStdObjDef : set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pSrcObj.type) dim pFieldDef dim iter : iter = 0
for each pFieldDef in pStdObjDef if iter <> 0 then 'pomijamy idobj select case pFieldDef.type case RELT_EMBED,RELT_ENUM 'wbudowane if not isobject(pSrcObj.field( iter )) then dim varValue : varValue = pSrcObj.field( iter ) if pHandler.translate(pSrcObj,pFieldDef,varValue) then pExportObj( pFieldDef.name ) = varValue end if end if case RELT_REF 'ref dim pRefObj : set pRefObj = pSrcObj.field( iter ) if pHandler.translate(pSrcObj,pFieldDef,pRefObj) then dim idObjRef : idObjRef = clng(0) if not pRefObj is nothing then std_export_object_fields = pHandler.std_export_any_object(pRefObj.type,pRefObj) if std_export_object_fields = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED then std_export_object_fields = 0 else idObjRef = pRefObj.idobj end if if (std_export_object_fields <> 0) then exit function end if end if pExportObj( pFieldDef.name ) = idObjRef end if
case RELT_WILDREF: 'dzika ref dim pWildRef : set pWildRef = pSrcObj.field( iter ) if pHandler.translate(pSrcObj,pFieldDef,pWildRef) then dim idObjWildRef : idObjWildRef = clng(0) if not pWildRef is nothing then std_export_object_fields = pHandler.std_export_any_object(pWildRef.type,pWildRef) if std_export_object_fields = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED then std_export_object_fields = 0 else idObjWildRef = pWildRef.idobj pExportObj( pFieldDef.name + "_wrt") = pWildRef.type end if if (std_export_object_fields <> 0) then exit function end if end if end if pExportObj( pFieldDef.name ) = idObjWildRef case RELT_FILE 'plik if (not pSrcObj.field( iter ).isEmpty()) then pExportObj( pFieldDef.name + "_ext" ) = pSrcObj.field( iter ).ext set pExportObj( pFieldDef.name ) = pSrcObj.field( iter ) end if case RELT_LIST bAnyList = true end select end if iter = iter + 1 next
end function
private function std_export_top_object(byref pHandler,byref pSrcObj) if not pHandler.should_export(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj,pSrcObj.versionid) then std_export_top_object = 0 exit function end if if not pHandler.can_export(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj) then std_export_top_object = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED exit function end if dim pExportObject : set pExportObject = pHandler.new_object(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj,pSrcObj.versionid)
if pHandler.get_level() > 1 or (pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) or (pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE) then pExportObject("_enter_sub") = clng(0) end if
dim bAnyList : bAnyList = false std_export_top_object = std_export_object_fields(pHandler,pExportObject,pSrcObj,bAnyList) if std_export_top_object <> 0 then exit function end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_NO_IMP_CORR if pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then dim id_korekta_sp:id_korekta_sp = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ , "pPopSprzed=" + cstr(pSrcObj.idobj)) if id_korekta_sp > 0 then pExportObject("_ma_korekte_") = clng(0) end if end if #endif
'jeśli potrzeba - issue command 'jeśli nie ma listy -> robimy to 'inplace' if pHandler.get_level() > 1 and not bAnyList then pExportObject("_save_now") = clng(0) pExportObject("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if
'zablokuj save aż do zakończenia eksportu dzieci if bAnyList then pExportObject("_begin_unit") = clng(0) end if
dim nImportMode : nImportMode = pHandler.importmode(pExportObject.typeid) if nImportMode <> DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE then pExportObject("_match_mode") = nImportMode end if
pHandler.on_object_exported pSrcObj,pExportObject
if not pHandler.export_object(pExportObject) then std_export_top_object = ERR_IMPORTER_BROKE exit function end if
if bAnyList then std_export_top_object = std_export_lists(pHandler,pSrcObj)
set pExportObject = pHandler.new_special_object() 'jeśli potrzeba - issue command if pHandler.get_level() > 1 or (pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) or (pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE) then pExportObject("_save_now") = clng(0) pExportObject("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if pExportObject("_end_unit") = clng(0) pHandler.export_object pExportObject end if
end function
private function std_export_child_object(byref pHandler,byref pSrcObj,byref pParent,byval strListField,byval nLP,byval bLast) if not pHandler.should_export(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj,pSrcObj.versionid) then std_export_child_object = 0 exit function end if if not pHandler.can_export(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj) then std_export_child_object = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED exit function end if
dim pExportObject : set pExportObject = pHandler.new_object(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj.idobj,pSrcObj.versionid) dim bAnyList : bAnyList = false std_export_child_object = std_export_object_fields(pHandler,pExportObject,pSrcObj,bAnyList) if std_export_child_object <> 0 then exit function end if
pExportObject("_parent_idobj") = clng(pParent.idobj) pExportObject("_parent_type") = clng(pParent.type) pExportObject("_parent_list") = cstr(strListField) pExportObject("_list_lp") = clng(nLP) if bLast then pExportObject("_last_child") = clng(0) end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_NO_IMP_CORR if pSrcObj.type = TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ then dim id_korekta_sp:id_korekta_sp = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ , "pPopSprzed=" + cstr(pParent.idobj)) if id_korekta_sp > 0 then pExportObject("_parent_ma_korekte_") = clng(0) end if end if #endif
dim nImportMode : nImportMode = pHandler.importmode(pExportObject.typeid) if nImportMode <> DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE then pExportObject("_match_mode") = nImportMode end if
pHandler.on_object_exported pSrcObj,pExportObject
if not pHandler.export_object(pExportObject) then std_export_child_object = ERR_IMPORTER_BROKE exit function end if
if bAnyList then std_export_child_object = std_export_lists(pHandler,pSrcObj) end if end function
private function std_export_lists(byref pHandler,byref pSrcParent) std_export_lists = 0 dim pStdObjDef : set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pSrcParent.type) dim pFieldDef for each pFieldDef in pStdObjDef if pFieldDef.type = RELT_LIST then dim pChildObj dim pListField : set pListField = pSrcParent.field(pFieldDef.name) dim nLP for nLP = 1 to pListField.count() - 1 std_export_lists = std_export_child_object(pHandler,pListField.get(nLP),pSrcParent,pFieldDef.name,nLP,false) if std_export_lists = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED then std_export_lists = 0 end if if std_export_lists <> 0 then exit function end if next if pListField.count() > 0 then std_export_lists = std_export_child_object(pHandler,pListField.get(pListField.count()),pSrcParent,pFieldDef.name,pListField.count(),true) if std_export_lists = ERR_EXP_NOT_ALLOWED then std_export_lists = 0 end if if std_export_lists <> 0 then exit function end if end if end if next end function
'--------------- useful helpers ------------------- function std_export_cursor(byref pHandler,byref pCursor) std_export_cursor = 0 dim pSrcObj for each pSrcObj in pCursor std_export_cursor = pHandler.std_export_any_object(pSrcObj.type,pSrcObj) if std_export_cursor <> 0 then exit function end if next end function
'-------------------------------------------------- function new_export_handler() set new_export_handler = new CNXDExportHandler end function
